---
name: ✨ Feature Request / Improvement
about: Suggest an improvement or a new task/module
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. (e.g. "I'm always frustrated when...")

**Describe the Proposed Solution**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Explain how it aligns with the project specification.

**Describe Alternatives Considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Target Module**
Which module does this improvement affect? (e.g. QR Attendance, Payments, Reports)

**Additional Context**
Add any other context, mockup drawings, or API thoughts here.
